common_footer_mission_1: Umgomo we-bitcoin.rocks ukusheshisa ukwamukelwa kwe-bitcoin ngemfundo.
common_footer_mission_2: Funda ukuthi ungafaka kanjani isandla kule phrojekthi evulekile.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_1: I-Bitcoin izinto ezimbili: imali yedijithali nenethiwekhi yokukhokha. Ungathumela i-Bitcoin (imali yedijithali) ngqo kwabanye abantu usebenzisa inethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin (inethiwekhi yokukhokha).
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_2: I-Bitcoin indlela entsha kakhulu yokugcina nokusebenzisa inani. Ngokungafani nezinethiwekhi zezezimali ezijwayelekile, inethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin ikwazi ukusebenza ngaphandle kweziphathimandla eziyinhloko noma abalawuli abathembekile. Lokhu kwenza i-Bitcoin ibe yimali yokuqala evulekile nengenamingcele.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_3: I-Bitcoin iyimali yedijithali ekunika ubunini obuphelele engcebeni yakho. Okokuqala emlandweni wesintu wonke umuntu angaba nempahla enqabile ngempela, engadingi imvume ukusetshenziswa, futhi engeke yathathwa uma igcinwe ngendlela efanele.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_4: I-Bitcoin ingathunyelelwa noma kuphi emhlabeni, ngokushesha nangesimali esiphansi. Ayidingi umthuthuki wesithathu, njengobhange.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_5: I-Bitcoin ivumela noma ubani ukugcina umcebo wabo ngokuphepha nangokuvikeleka ngaphandle kokukhathazeka ngohulumeni oweba noma ukwehlisa inani ngokuphrintwa kwemali.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_6: Ohulumeni yonke indawo bangaphrinta imali yephepha eyengeziwe, kodwa akekho ongaphrinta i-bitcoin eyengeziwe.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_7: Ungakwazi ukuzigcinela i-Bitcoin yakho kalula ukuze uthathe ukulawula okugcwele, okukunika ukufinyelela okugcwele emandleni e-Bitcoin.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_8: Uma ungalanda uhlelo lokusebenza, ungakwazi ukuzigcinela i-Bitcoin futhi ugcine umcebo wakho ngaphandle kokuncika kumuntu omunye.
common_bitcoin_volatile_content_1: Ngesikhathi esifushane, izinga lokushintshanisa le-Bitcoin livame ukuguquguquka. Lokhu kubizwa ngokuthi ukuguquguquka.
common_bitcoin_volatile_content_2: Kodwa ukuguquguquka okubona nsuku zonke 'kunyamalala' ngesikhathi eside.
common_bitcoin_volatile_content_3: I-Bitcoin iyaqhubeka nokuba nokuncane ukuguquguquka ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Njengoba abantu abaningi besebenzisa i-Bitcoin njengo-akhawunti yokonga isikhathi eside, ngokwengeziwe inani layo liya lizinza.
common_bitcoin_volatile_content_4: Abantu abaningi bakhetha ukugcina inani nge-Bitcoin iminyaka eminingi njengendlela ephephile yokunciphisa ingozi yokuguquguquka nokuvikela amandla abo okuthenga ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
common_bitcoin_volatile_content_5: Kwamanye amazwe, njenge-Venezuela, Sudan, Lebanon, Syria, Argentina, Turkey, Brazil, namanye amaningi, inani lemali yendawo likhuphula ngokushesha kangangokuthi i-Bitcoin ibhekwa njengendlela ezinzile kakhulu yokonga imali.
common_bitcoin_afford_content_1: Idola lenziwe ngamasenti angu-100. I-bitcoin yenziwe ngama-satoshi angu-100,000,000 (angu-100 million).
common_bitcoin_afford_content_2: Awudingi ukuba ne-bitcoin yonke. Abantu abaningi banama-sats nje. Ama-sats yizingxenye ze-bitcoin. Ngokwesibonelo, uma i-bitcoin yonke engu-$100,000 bese u-$1 ukukhokha ama-sats angu-1,000!
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_1: Kungenzeka ukuthi uzwile nge-'Bitcoin hack' ku-inthanethi noma ezindabeni. Abantu abaningi bafunda lezi zihloko futhi bakholelwe ukuthi inethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin igqekezwe. Kodwa inethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin ayikaze igqekezwe.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_2: Yini inethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin? Cabanga ngenethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin njengomzila wezitimela. Izitimela ezigibela emzileni wezitimela wenethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin yizinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_3: Lapho ufunda ngokugqekezwa kwe-Bitcoin ezindabeni, ufunda ngomgcini (njengo-FTX) ogqekezwayo noma oya emadlozini.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_4: Abagcini yizinkampani ezigcina i-bitcoin yakho. Kodwa lokho kuza nengozi: ukulahlekelwa yi-bitcoin yakho lapho inkampani iyiphatha kabi, iyeba, noma iya emadlozini.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_6: Wonke umuntu owethemba i-FTX nge-bitcoin yakhe walahlekelwa yi-bitcoin yakhe. Wonke umuntu owayegcina i-bitcoin yakhe ngokuzigcinela akazange athintwe nhlobo yi-FTX. Lokhu kungamandla e-bitcoin ekuzigcineleni: ukulawula kwangempela kwemali yakho.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_7: Esikhundleni sokushiya i-bitcoin yakho ku-exchange noma kwi-wrapper efana ne-ETF, yigcine esikhwameni sakho ukuze uthole zonke izinzuzo zenkululeko.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_8: Lapho uzigcinela i-bitcoin yakho, imali yakho ivikelwa yinethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin. Iyinethiwekhi yezezimali ephephile kunazo zonke emhlabeni.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_9: Ekuzigcineleni, u-Sam wase-FTX akakwazi ukweba i-bitcoin yakho.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_10: Uhulumeni akakwazi ukuphrinta i-bitcoin eningi futhi abangele infleshini.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_11: I-Bitcoin ekuzigcineleni iyimali yakho, ngamandla enethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin.
common_bitcoin_energy_content_1: I-Bitcoin isebenzisa amandla ukuvikela inethiwekhi nokuvikela imali yakho.
common_bitcoin_energy_content_2: I-Bitcoin isebenzisa inani elikhulu lamandla, futhi lokhu kuyinto enhle ngezizathu eziningi.
common_bitcoin_energy_list_2: I-Bitcoin isiza ukuzinza kwama-gridi amandla ngokumba i-bitcoin.
common_bitcoin_energy_list_3: I-Bitcoin inciphisa ukukhishwa kwegesi ekumbeni uwoyela.
common_bitcoin_energy_list_4: I-Bitcoin isebenzisa amandla amancane kunawatshenziswa ama-Americans ama-Christmas Lights unyaka ngamunye.
common_bitcoin_energy_list_5: I-Bitcoin iyimboni eluhlaza kunazo zonke emhlabeni!
common_cic_intro_1: Abantu abaningi bayazi nge-Compound Interest, kodwa abantu abambalwa bayazi nge-Compound Inflation.
common_cic_intro_2: Nge-Compound Inflation Calculator yethu, ungabala kalula inani umholo wakho odinga ukukhula ngalo ukuze ugcine amandla akho okuthenga ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
common_cic_intro_3: Faka umholo wakho wamanje, izinga lenfleshini, nenani leminyaka ofuna ukuyibala, futhi isibali sethu sizokubonisa ukuthi umholo wakho udinga ukuba yini ukuze uhambisane nenfleshini.
common_result_starting_message: Gcwalisa ifomu ngenhla bese uchofoza ibala.
common_error_message: Iphutha: Sicela ugcwalise zonke izindawo ezi-3 zefomu.
common_stickers_bulk_cheaper: Ngokwengeziwa kwezitika othengayo, ngokushesha ziba zimbi ngesitika ngasinye.
common_stickers_print_instructions_1: Ungabamba iqhaza ngokuphrinta izitika zakho, noma ngabe uhlala kuphi! Chofoza olimini lwakho ngezansi ukuze ulande amafayela ezitika kanye nemiyalelo.
common_stickers_print_instructions_2: Sicela uqaphele: akuzona zonke izitika ezitholakala ngezilimi zonke.
common_stickers_request_language_2: Gcwalisa ifomu ngezansi ukuze ucele amafayela ezitika ngolimi lwakho lwendawo.
common_stickers_printer: Sisebenzisa i-StickerMule.com kodwa ungasebenzisa noma iyiphi inkampani yezitika.
common_stickers_dimensions_cure_v2: 6.35 cm x 12.7 cm (2.5 in x 5 in)
common_nostr_protocol_c1: I-Nostr iyinqubo entsha ekuvumela ukuxhumana ku-inthanethi ngaphandle kokwesaba ukuvinjelwa, ukukhishwa, noma ukwehliswa
common_nostr_protocol_c2: Amapulatifomu afana ne-Twitter ne-Facebook alawulwa yinkampani eyodwa, kodwa akekho olawula inqubo ye-Nostr.
common_nostr_freedom_c1: I-Nostr ifana ne-imeyili. Akekho olawula inqubo ye-imeyili, futhi noma ubani angakha i-client (njenge-Gmail, Hotmail, njl.) phezu kwayo.
common_nostr_freedom_c2: Akekho olawula inqubo ye-Nostr, futhi noma ubani angakha i-client (njenge-Damus, Amethyst, njl.) phezu kwayo.
common_nostr_freedom_c3: Uma ungathandi indlela i-client ethile esebenza ngayo, ungahambisa i-akhawunti yakho ye-Nostr ngokushesha kuye ku-client eyenye ngaphandle kokulahlekelwa abalandeli noma okuqukethwe.
common_nostr_bitcoin_c1: I-Bitcoin ifakwe ngaphakathi kunqubo ye-Nostr. Uma ubona okuqukethwe okuthandayo, ungazapa i-bitcoin kumuntu njengesibongo!
common_nostr_bitcoin_c2: Kumapulatifomu acentralized afana ne-Twitter ne-Facebook, inkampani ecentralized ithola imali kokukuqukethwe. Kodwa ezinqubweni ezivulekile efana ne-Nostr, wena uthola imali kokukuqukethwe.
common_nostr_download_client: LANDA I-CLIENT YAMAHHALA UKUZE UJOYINE I-NOSTR
common_nostr_test: Indlela elula yokuzama i-Nostr usebenzisa i-akhawunti yokuhlola
common_kit_printer: Sincoma i-VistaPrint.com ukuphrinta amaphamfulethi akho e-Bitcoin Business Kit. Kodwa ungasebenzisa noma iyiphi inkampani yokuphrinta uma nje ingaphrinta ngamacelwa womabili.
common_biz_learn: Funda ukuthi kungani i-Bitcoin inhle ebhizinisini
common_biz_wallets: Thola isikhwama se-Bitcoin sokwamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin
common_biz_kit: Phrinta ikhithi yakho ye-Bitcoin Business Kit
common_sticker_files_mission_1: Umgomo wethu ukukusiza u-orange pill abantu abaningi ngokubeka izitika ze-Bitcoin emphakathini. Zonke izitika zethu zinamakhodi e-QR axhumana namakhasi emfundo nge
common_sticker_files_mission_4: Uma uhlala e-USA noma e-Canada, ungakwazi
